title: Luise, Königin von Preußen
writer: Walter von Molo, Fred Hildenbrand, Friedrich Raff
actors: Henny Porten, Gustaf Gründgens, Ekkehard Arendt
plot: Vehicle for one of Weimar era 's most beloved actresses: as the popular Prussian queen in 1806-1807,she presides over the humiliating Peace of Tilsit which Napoleon forces on the defeated Germans.
